caption: A man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a light blue patterned button-down shirt with a decorative beaded necklace, stands behind a wooden lectern. He is positioned in front of a background of brown wooden slats. A black microphone is positioned near his face, and he appears to be speaking. In the foreground, the back of the heads of several audience members are visible. The lectern features a logo with a stylized sunburst and the text "LIBRARY". The word "ORCA" is displayed as a white text overlay on a black background in the right side of the frame. Across the sequence, the man's facial expression and posture shift slightly as he speaks, and he occasionally looks down toward the lectern. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the speaker and the immediate surrounding environment.
